channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: The world's most famous sled dog race is longer than ever. Here's a look at Iditarod, by the numbers
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — The world’s most famous sled dog race is longer this year than ever before. Thanks to a lack of snow, this year's edition of the Iditarod Trail Sled Dog Race needed a new route across the Alaska wilderness.
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Palace reaches FA Cup quarterfinals after Millwall goalkeeper sent off for kick to the face
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Crystal Palace beat 10-man Millwall 3-1 in the fifth round of the FA Cup on Saturday after visiting goalkeeper Liam Roberts was sent off early for kicking forward Jean-Philippe Mateta in the face.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rangers trade Ryan Lindgren and Jimmy Vesey to the Avalanche
item.description: The Colorado Avalanche have made another splash ahead of the NHL trade deadline by acquiring defenseman Ryan Lindgren and winger Jimmy Vesey from the New York Rangers.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fruita dominates Liberty in Round 1 of 6A playoffs, as Jhett Wells explodes for 36 points
item.description: What we witnessed at Fruita Monument High School Friday night was nothing short of a Wildcat masterclass.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: CMU Baseball explodes at the plate for dominant double-header sweep
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — On an absolutely picturesque day for baseball at The Diamond at the Bus Bergman Sports Complex, CMU trailed MSU Billings 2-0 early. A 2-run shot to right by MSU's River Smith in the top of the 2nd put the Mavs in a hole.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Cavaliers' comeback win over Celtics give them confidence they can compete with defending champs
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — With Celtics fans in a frenzy throughout TD Garden after the Boston Celtics blitzed to a 25-3 lead over the Cavaliers in the final matchup of Eastern Conference frontrunners, Cleveland star Donovan Mitchell didn't panic. He actually was in a calm place.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani hits HR in 1st spring at-bat following offseason shoulder surgery
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Dodgers slugger Shohei Ohtani looked a little rusty for a moment on Friday night at Camelback Ranch, producing just one awkward swing and miss while working a full count against Los Angeles Angels pitcher Yusei Kikuchi in the first inning.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mitchell scores 41, Cavaliers overcome 22-point deficit to beat the Celtics 123-116
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 41 points, including 12 in the fourth quarter, to help the Cleveland Cavaliers rally from 22 points down and stun the Boston Celtics 123-116 on Friday night in the final regular-season meeting of the Eastern Conference’s top two teams.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kentucky CB Maxwell Hairston posts 4.28-second 40-yard dash on 2nd of NFL scouting combine workouts
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Cornerback Maxwell Hairston missed five games last season with Kentucky because of a shoulder injury. He certainly looked healthy Friday, looked just fine Friday, posting the first 40-yard dash under 4.3 seconds this week at the NFL's annual scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kentucky CB Maxwell Hairston posts 4.28-second 40-yard dash on 2nd of NFL scouting combine workouts
item.description: Kentucky cornerback Maxwell Hairston posted the fastest 40-yard dash so far this week, 4.28 seconds, on the second day of workouts at the NFL's annual scouting combine in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: JuJu Watkins and No. 4 USC visit No. 2 UCLA in winner-take-all game for Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It’s probably not what the Big Ten expected when the league opened its doors to UCLA and USC this season: two West Coast schools dominating the women’s basketball standings.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USA Swimming says Delaware AD Chrissi Rawak will not assume role as CEO and president
item.description: USA Swimming’s board of governors said Friday night that Delaware athletic director Chrissi Rawak will not assume the role as CEO and president because of “unforeseen personal circumstances that we learned about late this week.”.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Eagles star A.J. Brown reveals why he pursued football career over baseball
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles star wide receiver is one of the best players in the NFL, but he also played baseball in high school and was selected in the MLB Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-Vikings player calls Tim Walz 'disgusting, disgrace to football' for letting trans athletes in girls sports
item.description: Former Minnesota Vikings player Jack Brewer called out Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz for allowing transgender athletes to participate in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joel Embiid will miss the rest of the season for treatment and rehabilitation of his left knee
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — Joel Embiid could have been one of the all-time greats of his era. The 7-footer who anchored the 76ers' laborious rebuilding plan known as the Process sure flashed his dominance at times through his injury-riddled career. He dropped 70 points. Won an MVP and two scoring titles.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Knapp goes from a 59 to a 70 but still has the lead in the Cognizant Classic
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Jake Knapp was 11 shots worse than his opening round at the Cognizant Classic and still stayed in front, curling in a 15-foot birdie putt on his final hole Friday for a 1-under 70 and a one-shot lead over Matthieu Pavon.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn's Hugh Freeze expected to make a full recovery after being diagnosed with prostate cancer
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Auburn coach Hugh Freeze has been diagnosed with an early form of prostate cancer, the school announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump claims Eagles will visit White House for Super Bowl celebration after skipping 2018 visit
item.description: President Donald Trump said the Super Bowl champion Philadelphia Eagles plan to visit the White House to celebrate their championship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Riley Gaines urges AOC to change position on trans athletes in women's sports amid Rep's recent silence on it
item.description: Amid Alexandria Ocasion-Cortez's recent silence on the trans athlete debate, Riley Gaines has invited the congresswomen to switch sides on the issue.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks redemption in MLS home opener against Seattle Sounders
item.description: After a humbling early exit in the CONCACAF Champions Cup at the hands of Herediano, Real Salt Lake looks to hit the reset button ahead of their 2025 MLS regular season opener against the Seattle Sounders.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Georgia passes 'Riley Gaines Act' that aims to prohibit trans athletes from competing in female sports
item.description: The Georgia House passed the "Riley Gaines Act" on Thursday, which aims to keep transgender athletes from competing against biological girls and women.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating Jon Gruden into their ring of honor
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating former coach Jon Gruden into the team's ring of honor less than four years after removing him over his use of racist, homophobic and misogynistic language in emails he wrote to an NFL executive.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NFL coaches value face-to-face interviews with draft prospects at the scouting combine
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — DeMeco Ryans has experienced the NFL scouting combine as a player, assistant coach and head coach. He values the opportunity to meet draft prospects this week.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies go cold in 82-65 loss at Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State saw a five-game winning streak over Boise State come to an end Wednesday night at ExtraMile Arena, falling to the Broncos in an 82-65 road battle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose to Arizona in Josh Eilert's debut, 83-66
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - It was nearly an impossible task for the Runnin' Utes Wednesday night in their first game under interim head coach Josh Eilert. In his first game since Craig Smith was fired, Eilert's Utes got blown out by #22 Arizona, 83-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts high-stakes CONCACAF Champions Cup match up with CS Herediano
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns home for a decisive CONCACAF Champions Cup showdown against CS Herediano on Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: 28-year-old freshman at MiraCosta makes name as hoops star
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) — It might not look like it, but Ramel Bethea is old for a freshman — 28 years old to be exact. “Yea the age crazy," said Bethea, who is playing his first season of college basketball at MiraCosta College.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Giddey scores 25 points as the Bulls snap a 6-game skid with a 142-110 rout of the 76ers
item.description: Josh Giddey had 25 points, 16 rebounds and six assists as the Chicago Bulls ended a six-game skid by routing the Philadelphia 76ers 142-110 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah's comeback effort falls short at UCF, 76-72
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Darius Johnson scored a reverse layup with 2.5 seconds left to give UCF the lead and Keyshawn Hall added two free throws after a turnover as the Knights knocked off Utah, 76-72 Sunday to snap a seven-game losing streak and earn their first win in a month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Keyonte George scores 30 in Jazz win over Rockets
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George scored 30 points and Lauri Markkanen added 23 points and 10 rebounds to rally the Utah Jazz to a 124-115 victory over the Houston Rockets on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL gets shut out in MLS season opener by San Jose
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - From San Jose, Costa Rica to San Jose, California, Real Salt Lake has not been able to score a goal in this early part of the 2025 season. After a scoreless draw in the CONCACAF Champions Cup opener against C.S.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kent Johnson scores 2 goals, the Blue Jackets beat the Blackhawks 5-1 to end a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Zach Werenski scored and had two assists and Kent Johnson scored twice for the Columbus Blue Jackets in a 5-1 victory against the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
